No Poverty.reason: Tax policies, including "tax relief" (租稅減免), can be designed as social protection systems to support the poor, linking to Target 1.3.
evidence: 租稅減免、租稅獎勵與租稅規劃

Quality Education.reason: The course provides tertiary education in a specialized field, contributing to skills for employment (Targets 4.3, 4.4) by enabling students to "acquire accounting and taxation-related areas of expertise."
evidence: 習得會計與稅務相關 專業領域知識

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course covers "tax policy: Finance, investment-related taxes" and "tax incentives," which are key tools for promoting economic growth and productive activities (Targets 8.2, 8.3).
evidence: 租稅政策: 金融、投資相關租稅

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The study of "tax incentives" (租稅獎勵) and policies for "enterprise mergers" directly relates to promoting industrialization and supporting enterprises, linking to Targets 9.2 and 9.3.
evidence: 租稅政策: 企業併購、其他

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The course explicitly covers the "Principle of tax fairness" (租稅公平原則), a core concept for using fiscal policy to achieve greater equality, directly addressing Target 10.4.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: A core competency is to "identify...sustainability considerations of business situations," which can be influenced by tax policy, linking to corporate sustainable practices (Target 12.6).
evidence: understand and be able to identify the ethics, social responsibility, and sustainability considerations of business situations

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course is fundamentally about the rule of law (Target 16.3) in taxation, covering "legislation," "Constitutional Court judgments," and "tax collection procedures" to build transparent institutions (Target 16.6).
evidence: 大法官解釋&憲法法庭判決

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The entire course on taxation directly addresses Target 17.1, which focuses on strengthening "domestic resource mobilization" and improving "domestic capacity for tax and other revenue collection."
evidence: 租稅之意義及我國之租稅
